name: MLX90614 IR Thermometer (TO-39)
description: Melexis MLX90614 contactless infrared thermometer, SMBus (default 0x5A) or PWM output, factory-calibrated, TO-39 metal can. GY-906 module chip. Metal can: no electrical connection except via VSS.
dimensions_source: Melexis MLX90614 datasheet Rev021 p.47 Fig.41 (xxA can): flange D9.12, height 4.1, 4 leads D0.45 on D5.08 circle at 90deg, tab at 45deg between pins 4-1. Pinout Table 2/Fig.1 p.6 (bottom view, mirrored for footprint).
